name_en: Worship Hall and Main Hall of Okitsushima Shrine on Mount Kohata
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, comprising the worship hall and main hall of Okitsushima Shrine on Mount Kohata. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-12-01. Located at Kohata Aza Jike 49-1.

name_en: Yakushi Hall and Miniature Shrine of Iwakura-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, comprising the Yakushi hall and miniature shrine (zushi) of Iwakura-ji Temple. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-12-01. Located at Ōta Aza Iwamae 78.

name_en: Row-House Gate at Takenaka
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, a row-house gate (nagayamon). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-12-01. Located at Kohata Aza Takenaka 12.

name_en: Main Hall of Kado Shrine on Mount Kohata
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, the main hall of Kado Shrine on Mount Kohata. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-08-29. Located at Kohata Aza Jike 49-2.

name_en: Earthen Storehouse of the Kikori Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, an earthen-walled storehouse (dozō) of the Kikori family. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Kohata Aza Kamikaiya 23.

name_en: Muramatsu Family Residence
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, the residence of the Muramatsu family. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Kohata Aza Tate 707-2.

name_en: Old Well of the Honda Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, an old well of the Honda family. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Ōta Aza Takatsuki 22.

name_en: Grain Store at Ōmitori
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, a grain storehouse (kokuire). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1991-06-28. Located at Kohata Aza Ōmitori 571.

name_en: Hōkyōintō Pagoda of Jifuku-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the architecture (buildings) category, a hōkyōintō stone pagoda of Jifuku-ji Temple. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-02-01. Located at Ōta Aza Shirahige 48.

name_en: Nirvana Painting of Kōrin-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a nirvana (nehan) image of Kōrin-ji Temple. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-08-29. Located at Ōta Aza Nishida 1.

name_en: Votive Tablet: The Heavenly Rock Cave
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a votive tablet (ema) depicting the Heavenly Rock Cave (Ama no Iwato). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Ōta Aza Wakamiya 1.

name_en: Votive Tablet: Foreigner Leading a Horse
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a votive tablet (ema) depicting a foreigner leading a horse. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Tozawa Aza Tsukiyobata 90.

name_en: Paper Painting of the Thirteen Buddhas' Descent
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a paper painting (shihon) of the descent (raigō) of the Thirteen Buddhas. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Tozawa Aza Hosoda 10.

name_en: Colored Silk Painting of the Sixteen Good Deities
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a color-on-silk painting of the Sixteen Good Deities (Jūroku Zenshin). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Tozawa Aza Hosoda 10.

name_en: Paper Seed-Syllable Mandala of the Two Realms
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a paper seed-syllable (shuji) mandala of the Two Realms (Ryōkai). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Tozawa Aza Hosoda 10.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, portraits of successive generations of the Niwa clan. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1997-07-01. Located at Narita-machi 1-532.

name_romaji: Kanō Masunobu Hitsu Nishimura Shimanosuke Gazō
name_en: Portrait of Nishimura Shimanosuke by Kanō Masunobu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a portrait of Nishimura Shimanosuke brushed by Kanō Masunobu. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Ōta Aza Honmachi 215.

name_en: Self-Painted, Self-Inscribed Portrait of Niwa Mitsushige
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a self-painted and self-inscribed portrait of Niwa Mitsushige. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2009-06-01. Located at Niitaki 1-81.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a seated statue of Dainichi Nyorai (Mahāvairocana). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1978-07-03. Located at Shibukawa Aza Shimizu 9.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a large tablet (ōgaku) of the white fox. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1978-07-03. Located at Kamikawasaki Aza Mitsuishi 55.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden statue of Shakyamuni entering nirvana. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Nezaki 1-249.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a guardian wrestler (rikishi) statue of Kannon-ji Temple. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Satsuki-machi 3-65.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden standing statue of the Eleven-Headed Kannon Bodhisattva. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1984-06-26. Located at Tozawa Aza Tsukiyobata 90.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Shō Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden standing statue of Shō Kannon. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1987-04-01. Located at Satsuki-machi 1-66.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Bishamonten
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden standing statue of Bishamonten. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1987-04-01. Located at Kametani 2-186.

name_en: Bronze Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a bronze seated statue of Amida Nyorai. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-04-01. Located at Wakamiya 1-243.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Saishiki Senju Kannon Bosatsu Ryūzō

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a colored wooden standing statue of the Thousand-Armed Kannon Bodhisattva. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Kohata Aza Yamamoto 89.

name_en: Painted Wooden Seated Statue of Benzaiten
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a colored wooden seated statue of Benzaiten. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Kohata Aza Yamamoto 89.

name_romaji: Senju Kannon Bosatsu Ryūzō Benzaiten Zazō Hangi
name_en: Printing Blocks of the Thousand-Armed Kannon and Seated Benzaiten
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, printing woodblocks (hangi) of the standing Thousand-Armed Kannon Bodhisattva and seated Benzaiten. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Kohata Aza Yamamoto 89.

name_en: Bronze Standing Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Ōta Aza Honmachi 215.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden seated statue of Dainichi Nyorai. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-02-01. Located at Tozawa Aza Hosoda 10.

name_en: Bronze Bell of Mount Kohata
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a bronze bell (dōshō) of Mount Kohata. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-12-01. Located at Kohata Aza Jike 49-1.

name_romaji: Mikoshi Ikki Shijin (Suzaku Seiryū Byakko Genbu)
name_en: One Portable Shrine and the Four Guardian Deities (Suzaku, Seiryū, Byakko, Genbu)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, one portable shrine (mikoshi) together with the four guardian deities: Suzaku, Seiryū, Byakko, and Genbu. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1978-05-01. Located at Obama Aza Sorimachi 20.

name_en: Printing Blocks of the Eight Views of Dōmeki Station in Adachi, Mutsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, printing woodblocks (hangi) of the Eight Views of Dōmeki station in Adachi, Mutsu Province. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2009-06-01. Located at Dōmeki Aza Machi 215.

name_en: Sword Signed "Mutsu no Suke Hiromoto"
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a sword bearing the signature "Mutsu no Suke Hiromoto." Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2017-05-01. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (Nihonmatsu History Museum).

name_en: Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra in Six Hundred Scrolls
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the classical texts category, the Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra (Daihannyakyō) in six hundred scrolls. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1994-03-28. Located at Tozawa Aza Hosoda 10.

name_en: Aioishū in Twenty Volumes
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the classical texts category, the Aioishū in twenty volumes. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1999-07-01. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (Nihonmatsu History Museum).

name_en: Documents of the Niwa Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, the documents (monjo) of the Niwa family. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2018-06-29. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (deposited at the Nihonmatsu History Museum).
